home.title: Learn type matchups instead of only looking them up.
home.subtitle: Short sessions, clear explanations and a personal focus on your uncertain matchups.
home.freeDesc: Choose one of the four core modes.
home.noWeak: Answer at least 10 questions so the app can identify your weaknesses.
home.installDesc: Faster launch and better offline use.
mode.effectivenessDesc: Find all super-effective or resisted targets.
mode.multiplierDesc: Sort every attacking type by its damage multiplier.
mode.pokemonDesc: Recognize a Pokémon's type or dual type.
setup.title: Training settings
setup.name: Name only
session.question: Question {current}/{total}
session.multiHintText: Select every matching type, then check them together.
session.sortHintText: Tap a type first, then tap the correct column.
session.pokemonHintText: A Pokémon can have one type or a dual type.
session.effectQuestion: Which types does this type hit {relation}?
session.multiplierSubtitle: How strongly do they hit this defense?
session.pokemonQuestion: What types does this Pokémon have?
session.chooseFirst: Choose at least one type first.
session.allCorrect: Perfect — all 18 attacking types are sorted correctly.
session.leaveConfirm: Finish the session and show results?
session.exitConfirm: Leave training? Your current progress will be evaluated.
summary.reviewComplete: Every original mistake was answered correctly at least once.
learn.title: Type Lab
learn.subtitle: Understand first, then train with purpose.
learn.noData: No training data for this type yet.
stats.title: Statistics
stats.subtitle: Important information first, details split by area.
stats.typeHelp: Uncertain types are listed first. The arrow compares recent answers with your overall accuracy.
stats.errorHelp: Mistakes remain until you solve the same matchup correctly twice.
stats.noErrors: Great! There are no open mistakes right now.
settings.title: Settings
settings.subtitle: Rare actions stay here so training and navigation remain uncluttered.
settings.languageDesc: Changes the interface, type names and available Pokémon names immediately.
settings.themeDesc: Switches between the light and dark appearance.
settings.animationsDesc: Subtle motion for selection, feedback and page changes.
settings.hapticsDesc: Short feedback on supported mobile devices.
settings.tutorialDesc: Shows the six short introduction steps again.
settings.exportDesc: Saves your local progress as a JSON file.
settings.importDesc: Restores a previously exported save file.
settings.resetDesc: Deletes stats, XP, mistakes and settings on this device.
settings.resetConfirm: Do you really want to delete all learning progress?
settings.versionNote: Version 0.5 Alpha: new vector icons, impact quiz, quick repeat, more balanced questions and a personal training recommendation.
settings.offlineNote: The interface works offline. New Pokémon require an internet connection the first time and are cached afterwards.
settings.installIos: iPhone: Safari → Share → Add to Home Screen. Android: browser menu → Install app.
onboarding.welcomeText: Learn strengths, resistances and dual types in short, clear sessions.
onboarding.languageText: You can change it any time in Settings.
onboarding.basicsText: An attacking type hits one or two defending types. Dual-type factors are multiplied.
onboarding.effectCorrect: Correct: Fire deals 2× damage to Grass.
onboarding.effectWrong: Almost. The correct answer is Grass.
onboarding.sortText: Tap Water, then 2×. This is how you assign all 18 types in the multiplier quiz.
onboarding.sortDone: Exactly: Water hits Fire for 2× damage.
onboarding.pokemonTitle: One type or a dual type
onboarding.pokemonText: Pikachu has exactly one type. Which one?
onboarding.personalText: Mistakes are explained and collected in the mistake book. Uncertain types appear more often later.
achievement.first.title: First step
achievement.ten.title: On track
achievement.hundred.title: Endurance
achievement.streak5.title: Warmed up
achievement.streak5.desc: Get 5 correct answers in a row.
achievement.streak20.title: Unstoppable
achievement.streak20.desc: Get 20 correct answers in a row.
achievement.perfect.title: One hundred percent
achievement.perfect.desc: Finish a session with no mistakes.
achievement.daily.title: Daily goal
achievement.weak.title: Weakness hunter
toast.updatedDesc: Reload the page to use the latest version.
import.invalid: This is not a valid version 0.5, 0.4 or 0.3 save file.
install.unavailable: Use your browser menu to add the website to your home screen.
mode.impactDesc: Choose the exact multiplier for a single matchup.
session.impactHintText: For dual types, calculate both factors and multiply them.
session.impactQuestion: How strongly does this attack hit?
stats.recommendationEmpty: Answer a few questions and a personal recommendation will appear here.
stats.recommendationText: Train {mode}. {type} currently stands out as uncertain.
